welcome: 🎉 Welcome! 🎯 Quick guide: 1. Tap "🛒 Buy" 2. Choose the product you want 3. Complete the payment 4. After payment, send the Order ID for verification 🎯 Choose an option:
quick_menu_enabled: 🎯 Quick menu enabled below the chat bar.
wallet_topup_title: 💰 Top Up Wallet ✏️ Send the amount in USD you want to add: (Example: 5, 10.50, 25)
wallet_invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Please enter a number (ex: 5, 10, 20).
invalid_quantity: ❌ Invalid quantity Please send a valid positive number.
insufficient_stock: ❌ Insufficient stock We only have {stock} items available. Please choose a lower quantity.
no_categories: 📭 No categories available at the moment.
access_denied: ❌ Access Denied: This order does not belong to you.
tx_used: ❌ This transaction has already been used.
banned_msg: ⛔ You have been banned from this bot.
out_of_stock: ❌ Out of stock! This product is currently unavailable.
pay_step1: 1️⃣ Send the exact amount via Binance Pay
pay_step2: 2️⃣ After payment, send the Order ID or transaction reference here
delivery_error: ⚠️ Stock unavailable! It seems you took too long to complete the payment and the stock was sold out. ⚠️ Action required: Please contact support with Order ID #{order_id} to get a manual delivery or refund.
retry_order_id: Please verify that you sent the payment, then try again by sending the Order ID.
no_pending_order: ⚠️ No pending order. Use /start to begin again.
send_order_id: 📩 Send the Order ID or transaction reference to verify your payment.
promo_prompt: 🎫 Apply Promo Code ✏️ Send your promo code:
promo_invalid: ❌ Invalid or expired promo code! Please check the code and send it again, or cancel.
promo_max_uses_reached: ❌ Usage limit reached! You have already reached the maximum number of times you can use this promo code.
promo_product_invalid: ❌ Invalid Product! This promo code cannot be applied to this product.
promo_qty_limit: ❌ Quantity Limit! This promo code can only be used for orders of up to {max_qty} items.
promo_already_applied: ❌ A promo code has already been applied to this order.
order_expired_notification: ⏳ Time expired! Your order #{order_id} has been automatically cancelled because the payment was not received within the 5-minute time limit. If you still wish to purchase or if you have already paid, please start a new order.
order_cancelled: ❌ Order cancelled Your order has been cancelled. Return to the main menu to continue.
order_timeout: ❌ Order expired Your order #{id} has expired because payment was not received within 5 minutes.
support_title: 💬 Support For support, please contact the administrator on Telegram: @Drbatman2
ticket_created: ✅ Ticket #{id} created! We will respond shortly.
ticket_closed:
🔒 Your ticket #{id} has been closed.
Thank you for contacting us! 🙏
admin_stock_title: 📦 Stock Management Choose a product to add stock:
admin_enter_cat_emoji: 🎨 Send an emoji for this category (or /skip):
admin_broadcast_prompt: 📢 Send the message to broadcast to all users:
referral_title: 👥 Referral Program Invite your friends using your referral link! For every 20 friends you refer, you will receive a free link. To claim your reward, simply open a support ticket and contact the admin. 🔗 Your referral link: {link} 📊 Statistics: - Friends referred: {count}
referral_notif: 🎁 Referral commission received! You have earned a commission of {amount} from the purchase of your friend {friend}.
bep20_instructions: 📝 Instructions: 1️⃣ Send the exact USDT (BEP20) amount to the address above. 2️⃣ Once done, send the Transaction Hash (Tx Hash) here for verification.
bep20_send_tx_hash: 📩 Send the Transaction Hash (Tx Hash) to verify your payment.
bep20_invalid_tx_hash: ❌ Invalid transaction hash. Please send a valid 66-character hash (starting with 0x...)
trc20_instructions: 📝 Instructions: 1️⃣ Send the exact USDT (TRC20) amount to the address above. 2️⃣ Once done, send the Transaction Hash (Tx Hash) here for verification.
trc20_send_tx_hash: 📩 Send the Transaction Hash (Tx Hash) to verify your payment.
trc20_invalid_tx_hash: ❌ Invalid transaction hash. Please send a valid 64-character TRON tx hash (no 0x prefix).
tx_already_used: ❌ This transaction has already been used for another order.
